products.title: KONG Classic Dog Toy
products.description: The gold standard of dog toys. Stuff with treats for hours of mentally stimulating play. Ultra-durable natural rubber for power chewers.

products.title: Furminator Undercoat Deshedding Tool
products.description: Reduces loose hair from shedding up to 90%. Stainless steel edge reaches through topcoat to safely remove undercoat hair.

products.title: PetSafe Easy Walk No-Pull Dog Harness
products.description: Gently discourages pulling with front-chest leash attachment. Comfortable padded straps and quick-snap buckles.

products.title: Outward Hound Fun Feeder Slow Bowl
products.description: Maze-like ridges slow eating up to 10x. Helps reduce bloat and regurgitation. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

products.title: Outward Hound Hide-A-Squirrel Interactive Puzzle Toy
products.description: Interactive 2-in-1 plush puzzle with 3 squeaky removable squirrels. Keeps dogs mentally stimulated and entertained for hours.

products.title: Pet Botanics Training Reward Treats
products.description: Low-calorie training treats dogs love. Soft, chewy texture perfect for reward-based training. Made with real ingredients.

products.title: Wellness CORE Natural Grain Free Dry Dog Food
products.description: High-protein formula with premium turkey and chicken. Grain-free recipe ideal for sensitive stomachs. Rich in omega fatty acids.

products.title: Nylabone Dura Chew Power Chew Textured Ring
products.description: Tough nylon chew toy for aggressive chewers. Dental ridges help clean teeth and reduce plaque. Long-lasting durability.

products.title: Ruffwear Front Range Dog Harness
products.description: Padded chest and belly panel for comfort. Two leash attachment points for training versatility. Reflective trim for visibility.

products.title: Vittles Vault Stackable Pet Food Container
products.description: Airtight stackable design saves space. HDPE plastic keeps food fresh longer. Easy-pour spout and measuring cup included.

products.title: Chuckit! Indoor Ball Dog Toy
products.description: Soft foam ball perfect for indoor fetch. Won't damage furniture or walls. Lightweight and easy to throw. Compatible with Chuckit! launchers.

products.title: Wellness CORE Grain-Free Dog Food
products.description: High-protein formula with premium turkey and chicken. Grain-free recipe ideal for sensitive stomachs. Supports healthy skin and coat.
